content: Rendering polish after browser review: single-icon provider nodes now render icon + label as one horizontally spaced row, with both vertically centered on the node. The icon is no longer pinned to the top-left corner, and the label starts after a fixed icon/label gap to avoid overlap in compact components such as Ops Monitor. Verification: npm test -- --run test/icons.test.ts test/render.test.ts, npx tsc --noEmit, npm test, npm run build. Existing untracked reports/ left untouched.
